response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong general software engineering craftsmanship with 20 years of experience and a genuine quality-first mindset, he is fundamentally misaligned with this role. The position requires deep C++ expertise as its core competency, but his professional C++ experience is minimal (~6 months at National Instruments in 2014-2015). His recent 10+ years focus exclusively on web technologies (JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, React), not industrial automation. The role demands industrial cybersecurity, IoT, and protocol expertise (IEC standards, MQTT, Modbus) that are entirely absent from his background.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship with TDD, CI/CD, and quality-focused mindset across 20 years of experience
Proven leadership and mentoring ability through staff roles, organized educational workshops, and code-quality initiatives
Extensive Node.js and React experience directly applicable to the role's advantageous full-stack skills
concerns: Negligible professional C++ experience (~6 months in 2014-2015); primary expertise is JavaScript/TypeScript and DLang, not the core requirement
Zero background in industrial automation, IoT, or industrial cybersecurity (IEC 62443, SDL); career trajectory is web and AI tooling focused
Education is BS in Computer Science, not M.E./M.Tech in engineering; no demonstrated knowledge of embedded systems, multi-threading, or networking protocols

key_factors.factor: General software engineering quality and leadership
